title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
summary: The reviewer wants two test file changes in `operators/keystone/internal/controller/keystone_controller_test.go`: remove the tautological test at line 318 that only asserts a constant equals itself, and remove the unused `Client` field at line 1645 as flagged by the linter.

code_comments.body: Remove unnecessary test which only validates that a constant has a constant value
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Deleted the `TestKeystoneFinalizerConstant_HasExpectedValue` function (previously at line 318) along with its doc comment, since it only verified a constant equals a constant string.

code_comments.body: As already suggested by the linter, Remove the `Client`
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Replaced `r.Client.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, &updated)` with `r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, &updated)` at the flagged line, dropping the redundant `Client` accessor per the linter hint.

resolution_summary: Addressed both reviewer comments on the test file. Removed the trivial `TestKeystoneFinalizerConstant_HasExpectedValue` test that only asserted a constant equals a literal value, and dropped the redundant `.Client` accessor on the flagged line by switching `r.Client.Get` to `r.Get` (the embedded client makes the intermediary unnecessary, as the linter flagged). No other files were touched.
